case_title: CAPITAL ONE N.A. VS. EDITH Z. PACHECO et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT PACHECO, EDITH Z. DOES 1 TO 5, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-26-2009
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-30-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE N.A. SERVED JUN-29-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PACHECO, EDITH Z.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-30-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-23-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-23-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
